Catalog/Trauma/2.7mm/3.5mm Posterolateral Distal Humerus Plate
Cool Surgical Blue
🔩 Trauma FixationREF: MT-PT020X0XXL/R

2.7mm/3.5mm Posterolateral Distal Humerus Plate

AURIC · Humerus Plates

Advanced 2.7mm/3.5mm Posterolateral Distal Humerus Plate manufactured from biocompatible TiCP (Titanium Composite) for complex elbow fracture reconstruction. This anatomically contoured orthopedic implant features 2.5mm thickness with multiple length options (65mm-208mm) to accommodate diverse patient anatomies. Designed for posterolateral approach distal humerus fixation, ensuring optimal fracture stability and faster patient recovery. Ideal for trauma surgery applications in hospitals across Telangana.

MaterialTitanium (Pure/CP)
Frequently Asked Questions

Advanced 2.7mm/3.5mm Posterolateral Distal Humerus Plate manufactured from biocompatible TiCP (Titanium Composite) for complex elbow fracture reconstruction. This anatomically contoured orthopedic implant features 2.5mm thickness with multiple length options (65mm-208mm) to accommodate diverse patient anatomies. Designed for posterolateral approach distal humerus fixation, ensuring optimal fracture stability and faster patient recovery. Ideal for trauma surgery applications in hospitals across Telangana.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the 2.7mm/3.5mm Posterolateral Distal Humerus Plate, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The 2.7mm/3.5mm Posterolateral Distal Humerus Plate is constructed using Titanium (Pure/CP), ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
